request_summary: Adjust JARVIS so analyst gaps are asked one by one but accumulated and sent back to analyst as a labeled batch per round

context.notes: Need to refine the analyst loop so JARVIS captures one gap at a time in the UI, accumulates answers by gap ID, and sends one consolidated labeled batch back to analyst instead of forwarding each raw answer immediately. Architect behavior must remain correct.

approved_plan.description: Update the JARVIS analyst loop and state schema so user answers are accumulated by gap ID and sent to analyst as one consolidated labeled batch per round instead of one raw answer at a time

approved_plan.description: Verify that analyst responses are now batched and labeled correctly, and that architect interaction behavior remains consistent without regression
approved_plan.output: Verified batched analyst answer behavior and fixed minor wording/schema inconsistencies so analyst collection, batch-send, startup, health-check, and resume behavior remain aligned without regressing architect interactions
